name: Suicidal Town
description: Suicidal Town (STC) is a predominantly Cambodian-American street gang based in Long Beach, California, emerging in the 1980s among Khmer Rouge genocide refugees. They are part of the Southeast Asian gang landscape in Long Beach alongside the Tiny Rascal Gang and Asian Boyz.

sources.title: Suicidal Town, Long Beach, California — StreetGangs
